data.name: lblWelcomeDesc.Text
data.value:
This program will guide you through the installation of SimTools.
SimTools is designed to help implement the best fixes and tweaks for your installations of the various sim games. Many of the older games are left unoptimized and even more so, early Maxis games circa 1990's have a hard time running on newer hardware. SimTools aims to address all of the above issues.
It is recommended that you close all other applications before starting Setup.
NOTICE: Given the nature of the program and its requirement to write files to the Program Files directory, both this installer and the SimTools application require administrative privleges.

data.name: richTextBox2.Text
data.value: The 64-Bit version of SimTools is ideal for modern systems running on a multi-core CPU or above with 8GB+ of system memory. 64-Bit system executables are more common in todays computing and have a 16EB~ (theoretical) usage limit.

data.name: label1.Text
data.value: By default, SimTools installs to the Program Files directory, but you may install it anywhere that you would like. Fixes and tweaks will still be written to game directories that may reside in Program Files however, so you will need to run the program as an administrator.

data.name: lblReadyDesc.Text
data.value:
Setup is now ready to begin installing SimTools on your computer.
If you have selected any additional utilities. They will be installed alongside SimTools.
This installer is designed with a small footprint and fetches files from the internet during installation. If you have a firewall installed, please be sure to allow the SimTools Installer outbound and inbound access to the internet.
Click Install to continue.

data.name: label2.Text
data.value: Please be sure that you are running the installer as an administrator. If you continue to encounter issues, please submit a bug report to the SimTools Installer GitHub (https://github.com/dbrown1986/SimToolsInstaller/issues) or on the SimTools Community Discord server.
